previousDayImpact: Spain's victory over Portugal provided a significant 13-point boost for Team Mack, Metcalf Hurts, and Team Camouflage Cndm, creating separation from those who backed the losing side.
Belgium's 4-1 win over the USA was a consensus-heavy event, providing only a minor 1-point gain for most of the field and failing to shake up the top of the leaderboard.
leaderboardSummary: Team Mack surged 4 spots to reach 2nd place following their successful pick of Spain.
Team koyn climbed 3 spots to 7th place after securing 17 points from their Belgium and USA selections.
Team Godfather maintains the lead despite minimal gains, holding a narrow advantage over the chasing pack.
leverageWatch: The Egypt vs. Argentina match offers high stakes, as Team Godfather and Brent's Daddy back Egypt while four other entries are heavily invested in Argentina.
Team Mack and Bijan Mustard have a unique interest in Colombia, while Team Pahl stands alone with their pick of Switzerland in the same matchup.
